features: Light & gentle lotion to help firm & revive your skin.
Packed with Collagen to improve skins elasticity
Helps protect your skin from premature ageing
description: Product Description Energise and tone your skin with our Collagen & Q10 Body Lotion. Our light and gentle lotion is packed with Collagen and Ubiquinone (Q10), which help improve elasticity and protect your skin against premature ageing. It's time to give your body the TLC it deserves! Ingredients Aqua, Cetearyl Alcohol, Paraffinum Liquidum, Hydrolyzed Collagen, Tocopheryl Acetate, Ubiquinone, Glyceryl Stearate, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Phenoxyethanol, C13-14 Isoparaffin, Laureth-7, Polyacrylamide, Parfum, Chlorphenesin, Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone, Cinnamyl Alcohol, Geraniol, Hexyl Cinnamal, Linalool. Safety Warning For external use only See more
